title: pseuderanthemum minutiflorum
intro: Pseuderanthemum minutiflorum, also known as the small-flowered false hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum minutiflorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a dried powder, and can be found in various traditional remedies and supplements.
